note: TOYBOX Phase 1 content bank. Each entry declares its float-uniform params — the single source of truth for the card faders (and later CV targets). GLSL is fetched lazily from `glsl` on selection (NOT JS-bundled). GEN families live under `gen`, FX families under `shaders`.

presets.label: PLASMA DISSOLVE
presets.note: Shader-only crossfade: hsv-plasma faded over cos-gradient. cv1 drives the fade.

presets.label: COW ON CAMERA
presets.note: OBJ luma-keyed over a generated backdrop: the chrome Spot floats over a worley field. cv3 spins the cow. (Layer 0 substitutes bundled worley-cells for a live video feed — TOYBOX has no video input port.)

presets.label: WORLEY BLOOM
presets.note: Three-source chain: worley chroma-keyed over a gradient, screen-mapped with plasma. cv2 drives the map mix, cv5 the worley density. (Layer 1 substitutes bundled cos-gradient for a live video feed.)

presets.label: TEXTURED SPHERE
presets.note: Texmap showcase: layer 0 = a sphere whose SURFACE is layer 1's worley field (material.surfaceSource = 1), UV-mapped onto the mesh instead of a flat matcap. Layer 1 renders the worley shader (also the OUTPUT base so the field shows around the textured sphere).

presets.label: REACTOR FIELD
presets.note: Multi-stage gen + obj + shader: noise screen-mapped with worley, then a neon teapot luma-keyed over the field.

presets.label: PROJECTION MAP
presets.note: Projection mapping (#45): layer 0 = a torus whose SURFACE is layer 1's plasma field PROJECTED onto the mesh from a front viewpoint (surfaceMode 'projective'), instead of UV-wrapped — the 'video projector aimed at geometry' look. Front-facing + in-frustum guards keep the projection off the back faces. Layer 1 also renders behind as the OUTPUT base. cv3 spins the torus through the projection.

presets.label: GROWING PEAK (WEATHER)
presets.note: ORIGINAL multi-buffer growable terrain (clean-room, this project): a 'frag' layer hosts a 3-pass project — Common (peak-common: hash/value-noise/ridge target) + BufferA (peak-bufferA: a GROWABLE heightmap, RGBA32F, self-feedback ping-pong, easing toward a ridge target so the peak RISES over many frames; iMouse click RAISES the height under the cursor) + Image (peak-image: a fixed-step height-tracer reading BufferA, with a day<->night sky, drifting clouds, distance fog + rain). CLICK the preview to GROW the mountain faster. Distinct from any eroded-island look — a single solitary growing peak under live weather. Buffers converge over several frames.

presets.label: MOUNTAIN WEATHER
presets.note: The single-pass GROWING MOUNTAIN GEN (original, clean-room) routed straight to output: an animated raymarched peak that grows over time under a day<->night sky with drifting clouds, fog, rain + lightning. CLICK the preview to grow the peak. cv1 boosts GROWTH, cv2 drives WEATHER intensity.

presets.label: GLITCH TV
presets.note: Two original GLITCH FRAGs stacked over a flow field: layer 0 = FLOW FIELD (GEN), layer 1 = SCANLINE-BLINDS (FRAG, greyscale horizontal-hold) reading layer 0, layer 2 = DATAMOSH-WAVE (FRAG, rainbow VHS-corruption) reading the blinds output. OUTPUT shows the datamosh. cv4 drives the datamosh WAVE, cv5 the blinds TEAR.

presets.label: SPIRAL FEEDBACK
presets.note: A feedback mandala: layer 0 = SPIRAL BLOOM (GEN) fed through a FEEDBACK combine node in TUNNEL mode (droste zoom trails), then the EDGE-GLOW FRAG (layer 1) neon-outlines the result. Shows the stateful FEEDBACK op + a FRAG over a feedback chain. cv1 → feedback ZOOM, cv2 → feedback DECAY.

presets.label: WAVE INTERFERENCE
presets.note: INTERFERENCE (GEN) screen-mapped with a FLOW FIELD then zoom-warped: layer 0 = INTERFERENCE, layer 1 = FLOW FIELD, MAPped together, then the ZOOM-WARP FRAG (layer 2) swirls the composite. cv3 → zoom-warp TWIST, cv6 → map MIX.

presets.label: CAT FEEDBACK (drop your media)
presets.note: CAT-FEEDBACK demo wiring (#39/#44 spirit): an OBJ layer (layer 0, Spot the cow as the bundled CC0 stand-in mesh — drop a CC0 cat OBJ in if you have one) whose SURFACE is layer 1's VIDEO mapped onto the mesh (material.surfaceSource = 1) — DROP YOUR CAT VIDEO onto layer 1 (kind 'video', file source, contentId/videoMeta unset → user-supplied; nothing unverified is bundled). Layer 2 is a BACKGROUND image — DROP YOUR CAT PHOTO/BACKGROUND there (kind 'image', imageBytes null → user-supplied). The chain routes the surface-mapped cat OBJ through TWO FEEDBACK combine nodes in different modes (fb1 TUNNEL droste-zoom trails, fb2 ADDITIVE glow trails), lumakeyed over the background. cv1 → fb1 ZOOM, cv2 → fb2 DECAY, cv3 spins the cow. The DELIVERABLE is the wiring; media is user-supplied so no unverified-license asset ships.

presets.label: OCEAN VOYAGE
presets.note: COMPLETE scene: the clean-room SEASCAPE ocean (GEN, layer 0) glitched by the CHROMATIC-SHIFT FRAG (layer 1) reading it as iChannel0 — rolling water with a broken-signal RGB fringe. OUTPUT shows the fragged ocean. cv1 → chromatic SHIFT, cv2 → ocean SPEED, cv3 → ocean HEIGHT.

presets.label: NEON DESCENT
presets.note: COMPLETE scene: the clean-room OCTGRAMS neon octahedron lattice (GEN, layer 0) silk-screened by the POSTERIZE FRAG (layer 1) reading it — a luminous wireframe descent flattened into graphic ink bands. OUTPUT shows the posterized lattice. cv1 → octgrams GLOW, cv2 → posterize LEVELS, cv4 → posterize DUOTONE.

presets.label: PRIMITIVE POOL
presets.note: COMPLETE scene: the RAYMARCH-PRIMITIVES SDF gallery (GEN, layer 0) screen-MAPped with the CAUSTIC-POOL water light (GEN, layer 1) — chrome primitives glinting under dancing pool caustics. OUTPUT = the MAP composite. cv2 → map MIX, cv3 → primitives SPIN, cv5 → caustic SPEED.

presets.label: STARRY NIGHT (van gogh)
presets.note: COMPLETE scene: the fixed VAN GOGH SUNSET swirling Starry-Night sky (GEN, layer 0) softened by the BLOOM FRAG (layer 1) reading it — the painting's luminous stars + moon get a thick impasto glow. OUTPUT = the bloomed painting. cv1 → bloom GLOW, cv2 → sky SWIRL, cv4 → sky WARMTH.

presets.label: PLASMA TERMINAL
presets.note: COMPLETE scene: the PLASMA FLOW liquid-light field (GEN, layer 0) rendered as ASCII text-mode by the ASCII FRAG (layer 1) reading it — flowing plasma reduced to a glowing green terminal of procedural glyphs. OUTPUT = the ASCII output. cv1 → ascii TINT, cv2 → plasma SPEED, cv3 → ascii CELLS.

presets.label: TUNNEL TV
presets.note: COMPLETE scene: the WARP TUNNEL fly-through (GEN, layer 0) shot off a tube TV by the CRT FRAG (layer 1) reading it — an infinite wormhole with screen curvature, phosphor mask + scanlines. OUTPUT = the CRT output. cv1 → tunnel SPEED, cv2 → CRT MASK, cv5 → CRT CURVE.

presets.label: COMIC GYROID
presets.note: COMPLETE scene: the GYROID SLICE organic lattice (GEN, layer 0) silk-screened by the HALFTONE FRAG (layer 1) reading it — a morphing minimal-surface inked as a comic-book dot screen. OUTPUT = the halftone. cv1 → halftone CELLS, cv2 → gyroid SPEED, cv4 → halftone DUOTONE.

presets.label: CHROME TEAPOT
presets.note: COMPLETE OBJ scene: the UTAH TEAPOT (OBJ, layer 0, CHROME matcap) spinning over the PLASMA FLOW field (GEN, layer 1), luma-keyed so the plasma shows around the silhouette. OUTPUT = the lumakey composite. cv3 spins the teapot, cv2 → key amount, cv5 → plasma SPEED.

presets.label: NEON KNOT
presets.note: COMPLETE OBJ scene: a NEON-matcap TORUS KNOT (builtin, layer 0) tumbling over the HYPERSPACE star-warp (GEN, layer 1), luma-keyed so the streaking stars show behind it. OUTPUT = the lumakey composite. cv3 spins the knot, cv1 → warp SPEED, cv5 → knot SCALE.

presets.label: CAUSTIC COW
presets.note: COMPLETE OBJ scene: SPOT THE COW (OBJ, layer 0) whose SURFACE is the CAUSTIC POOL water light (layer 1) UV-mapped onto the mesh (material.surfaceSource = 1) — a cow textured with dancing pool caustics, the caustic field also rendering behind as the OUTPUT base. cv3 spins the cow, cv2 → caustic SPEED.

presets.label: CLAY PAWN TERRAIN
presets.note: COMPLETE OBJ scene: a CLAY-matcap CHESS PAWN (OBJ, layer 0) standing over the WARP TERRAIN flyover map (GEN, layer 1), luma-keyed so the generated land shows around it. OUTPUT = the lumakey composite. cv3 spins the pawn, cv2 → terrain SPEED, cv5 → terrain WARP.

presets.label: METABALL MIRROR
presets.note: COMPLETE scene: the METABALL FIELD gooey blobs (GEN, layer 0) folded into a mirrored kaleidoscopic quilt by the MIRROR-FOLD FRAG (layer 1) reading it. OUTPUT = the folded blobs. cv1 → fold SPIN, cv2 → metaball SPEED, cv6 → fold DRIFT.
